name: GST/His Pull-Down Assay (Protein-Protein Interaction)
nameCn: GST/His Pull-Down 蛋白互作实验

components.name: 1. Express and purify GST-bait protein (or His-bait) from E. coli

note.en: gst_tag_purification or his_tag_purification. Need ≥5 µg purified bait per reaction. Also purify GST-alone as negative control.
note.zh: gst_tag_purification 或 his_tag_purification。每个反应需 ≥5 µg 纯化诱饵蛋白。同时纯化 GST 单独作为阴性对照。

components.name: 2. Prepare prey protein: cell lysate or purified recombinant

note.en: Cell lysate: lyse 10⁷ cells in 500 µL NP-40 lysis buffer (np40_lysis + protease inhibitors), 30 min ice. Clarify: 16,000×g 15 min 4°C. Pre-clear lysate with empty beads (glutathione or Ni-NTA) 1 h 4°C.
note.zh: 细胞裂解物：10⁷ 细胞加 500 µL NP-40 裂解液（np40_lysis + 蛋白酶抑制剂），冰上 30 min。16,000×g 15 min 4°C 澄清。空白磁珠预清除 1 h 4°C。

components.name: 3. Immobilize bait: 5 µg GST-bait + 20 µL glutathione beads (or 5 µg His-bait + Ni-NTA beads)

note.en: Rotate 1 h 4°C in binding buffer (PBS + 0.1% NP-40 + 1 mM DTT). Wash beads 3× to remove unbound bait.
note.zh: 结合缓冲液（PBS + 0.1% NP-40 + 1 mM DTT）中 4°C 旋转 1 h。洗涤 3 次去除未结合诱饵。

components.name: 4. Add prey: 500 µg cell lysate (or 5 µg purified prey) to bait-beads

note.en: Final volume ~500 µL in binding buffer. Controls: (a) GST-alone beads + same prey (negative); (b) GST-bait beads + lysate buffer only (no-prey control).
note.zh: 终体积 ~500 µL 结合缓冲液。对照：(a) GST 空白磁珠 + 同样猎物（阴性）；(b) GST-诱饵磁珠 + 仅缓冲液（无猎物对照）。

note.en: Longer incubation = more background. Start with 2 h; optimize.
note.zh: 孵育时间越长背景越高。先试 2 h；后续优化。

components.name: 6. Wash beads 4–5× with wash buffer (PBS + 0.1–0.5% NP-40 + 150–300 mM NaCl)

note.en: High NaCl/detergent washes reduce background. Typical: 3× with 0.1% NP-40 + 150 mM NaCl; then 2× with 0.5% NP-40 + 300 mM NaCl. Centrifuge 2,500×g 2 min between washes.
note.zh: 高盐/高去污剂减少背景。典型：3× 0.1% NP-40 + 150 mM NaCl；2× 0.5% NP-40 + 300 mM NaCl。洗涤间离心 2,500×g 2 min。

components.name: 7. Elute: add 30 µL 2× Laemmli + boil 95°C 5 min; or 50 µL glutathione elution (10 mM GSH)

note.en: SDS elution: fast and complete but denatures proteins (no downstream native assay). Glutathione elution: native, lower yield.
note.zh: SDS 洗脱：快速完全但蛋白变性（无法用于后续天然条件实验）。谷胱甘肽洗脱：非变性条件，产量低。

components.name: 8. Western blot: detect prey protein with specific antibody

note.en: Load: 5% input, GST-bait pull-down, GST-alone pull-down. Blot for prey protein AND bait (Coomassie or anti-GST to show equal loading). Interaction confirmed if prey band appears only in bait lane (not GST-alone).
note.zh: 上样：5% input、GST-诱饵 pull-down、GST 空白 pull-down。检测猎物蛋白和诱饵蛋白（考马斯或 anti-GST 证明等量上样）。猎物条带仅在诱饵泳道出现（非 GST 空白）即确认互作。

notes.en: Pull-down is the in vitro version of Co-IP — uses purified recombinant bait. Advantages: no cross-reactivity of IP antibodies, controls for direct vs indirect interaction. Limitations: bait is bacterially expressed (no PTMs); overexpression artifacts. For in vivo interaction, use coip_protocol. For transient interactions: crosslink (DSP, 0.5 mM) before lysis.
notes.zh: Pull-down 是 Co-IP 的体外版——使用纯化重组诱饵蛋白。优势：避免 IP 抗体交叉反应，可区分直接/间接互作。局限：诱饵蛋白为原核表达（无 PTM）；过表达伪影。体内互作用 coip_protocol。短暂互作：裂解前交联（DSP，0.5 mM）。

ref: Brymora et al. (2004) Methods Mol Biol 261:247–262; Louche et al. (2017) Methods Mol Biol 1615:553–564

usage.en: Detect direct protein-protein interactions using an in vitro pulldown assay with tagged bait protein.
usage.zh: 体外 pulldown 实验检测标签蛋白与靶蛋白的直接相互作用。

note.en: Purified bait protein can be stored at −80°C in aliquots for months
note.zh: 纯化的诱饵蛋白可 −80°C 分装保存数月

note.en: Pre-cleared cell lysate can be snap-frozen at −80°C for later use
note.zh: 预清除的细胞裂解物可 −80°C 速冻保存

note.en: Eluted samples in Laemmli buffer can be stored at −20°C for up to 1 month before WB
note.zh: Laemmli 缓冲液中的洗脱样品可 −20°C 保存 1 个月后再 WB

detailedSteps.en: Express and purify GST-bait (or His-bait) protein from E. coli. Need ≥5 µg per reaction. Also purify GST-alone as negative control
detailedSteps.zh: 从大肠杆菌表达并纯化 GST-诱饵（或 His-诱饵）蛋白。每个反应需 ≥5 µg。同时纯化 GST 空白作为阴性对照

detailedSteps.en: Prepare prey: lyse 10⁷ cells in 500 µL NP-40 lysis buffer + protease inhibitors, 30 min on ice. Clarify at 16,000×g, 15 min, 4°C. Pre-clear lysate with empty beads for 1 h at 4°C
detailedSteps.zh: 制备猎物蛋白：10⁷ 细胞加 500 µL NP-40 裂解液 + 蛋白酶抑制剂，冰上 30 min。16,000×g 离心 15 min，4°C 澄清。空白珠子 4°C 预清除 1 h

detailedSteps.en: Mix 5 µg GST-bait with 20 µL glutathione beads (or His-bait with Ni-NTA beads) in binding buffer (PBS + 0.1% NP-40 + 1 mM DTT). Rotate 1 h at 4°C
detailedSteps.zh: 将 5 µg GST-诱饵与 20 µL 谷胱甘肽珠（或 His-诱饵与 Ni-NTA 珠）在结合缓冲液（PBS + 0.1% NP-40 + 1 mM DTT）中混合。4°C 旋转 1 h

detailedSteps.en: Wash bait-loaded beads 3× with binding buffer to remove unbound bait protein
detailedSteps.zh: 用结合缓冲液洗涤已结合诱饵的珠子 3 次，去除未结合的诱饵蛋白

detailedSteps.en: Add 500 µg pre-cleared cell lysate (or 5 µg purified prey) to bait-beads in ~500 µL total. Set up controls: (a) GST-alone beads + prey; (b) bait-beads + buffer only
detailedSteps.zh: 将 500 µg 预清除裂解物（或 5 µg 纯化猎物）加入诱饵珠中，总体积 ~500 µL。设置对照：(a) GST 空白珠 + 猎物；(b) 诱饵珠 + 仅缓冲液

detailedSteps.en: Incubate with rotation at 4°C for 2–4 h (start with 2 h; longer incubation increases background)
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C 旋转孵育 2–4 h（先试 2 h；孵育时间越长背景越高）

detailedSteps.en: Wash beads 4–5×: 3× with PBS + 0.1% NP-40 + 150 mM NaCl, then 2× with PBS + 0.5% NP-40 + 300 mM NaCl. Spin 2,500×g 2 min between washes
detailedSteps.zh: 洗涤珠子 4–5 次：3× PBS + 0.1% NP-40 + 150 mM NaCl，再 2× PBS + 0.5% NP-40 + 300 mM NaCl。洗涤间 2,500×g 离心 2 min

detailedSteps.en: Elute: add 30 µL 2× Laemmli buffer, boil at 95°C for 5 min. Alternative: 50 µL glutathione elution (10 mM reduced GSH) for native elution
detailedSteps.zh: 洗脱：加 30 µL 2× Laemmli，95°C 煮 5 min。替代方法：50 µL 谷胱甘肽洗脱液（10 mM 还原型 GSH）用于非变性洗脱

detailedSteps.en: Load on SDS-PAGE: 5% input, GST-bait pull-down, GST-alone pull-down. Blot for prey protein and bait (anti-GST or Coomassie). Interaction confirmed if prey band present only in bait lane
detailedSteps.zh: SDS-PAGE 上样：5% input、GST-诱饵 pull-down、GST 空白 pull-down。检测猎物蛋白和诱饵（anti-GST 或考马斯）。猎物条带仅在诱饵泳道出现即确认互作

briefSteps.en: Purify GST-bait + GST control → prepare prey lysate → immobilize bait on beads → add prey → rotate 2–4 h 4°C → wash 4–5× (low/high stringency) → elute (Laemmli or GSH) → WB detect
briefSteps.zh: 纯化 GST-诱饵 + GST 对照 → 制备猎物裂解物 → 诱饵固定于珠上 → 加猎物 → 4°C 旋转 2–4 h → 洗涤 4–5 次（低/高严格度）→ 洗脱（Laemmli 或 GSH）→ WB 检测
